name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem in ai-engkit
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug"]
assignees: []
---

## Summary

Describe the problem clearly and briefly.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. Open `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected behavior

Describe what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior

Describe what actually happened.

## Environment

- Host OS:
- Docker version:
- Docker Compose version:
- ai-engkit version / image tag:
- Installation method:
  - [ ] `install.sh`
  - [ ] `upgrade.sh`
  - [ ] local development build
- Workspace mode:
  - [ ] named volume
  - [ ] bind mount

## Relevant configuration

If applicable, include relevant `.env` values or compose overrides.

> Do not paste secrets, tokens, passwords, or private keys.

## Logs / command output

```text
paste logs here
```

## Additional context

Add screenshots, notes, or related links if helpful.

## Language

You may write this report in English or Traditional Chinese.

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues first
- [ ] I can reproduce this issue consistently
- [ ] I included environment details
- [ ] I removed secrets from logs and config snippets
